title: ToolCall
description:
A single tool call — the unit of effect an [`Agent`] can request.
Shape mirrors `nexus_kernel::PluginContext::ipc_call` args so the
[`ToolDispatcher`] adapter can forward directly without reshaping.

args.description: Arbitrary JSON payload — serialized and handed to the plugin.

command_id.description: Command id within the target plugin (e.g. `"read_file"`).

target_plugin_id.description: Reverse-DNS id of the target plugin (e.g. `"com.nexus.storage"`).
